creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Created attachment 229700
new port: sysutils/rubygem-sd_notify

This new port is required for net/foreman-proxy version 3.0.1:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=260019

This new port apparently is not actively used on FreeBSD (due to the lack of systemd). However, the alternative would be to patch the source code of foreman-proxy, which is usually not desireable. So I'd assume that shipping a tiny no-op dependency port is the better approach.
